items.body:
## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: `pnpm-lock.yaml` has a merge conflict with `main`. Auto-fix was attempted but failed (ADO npm feed returned 403). Please follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to resolve manually.

> **Note:** This PR is currently in **draft** state. Please mark it as ready for review once the conflict is resolved and CI passes.

No API design issues found. The `@azure/arm-servicefabric` 4.0.0-beta.1 TypeSpec migration looks clean:
- Version `4.0.0-beta.1` is consistent across `package.json`, `src/api/serviceFabricManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- No alpha versions present.
- `CHANGELOG.md` correctly compares with `3.0.0` (prior stable; this is the first beta).
- No `_N` suffix, `AutoGenerated`, or `_` prefix naming issues.
- `KnownVersions` contains both preview versions (`2023-11-01-preview`, `2026-03-01-preview`).
- Client name `ServiceFabricManagementClient` is preserved.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38022,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>
